title: Ultimate Vanish
description: Best working vanish plugin not bad like others
body:
### Ultimate Vanish — Invisible Presence, Total Control

Ultimate Vanish lets staff become truly invisible while remaining fully active in the world. When vanished, operators are removed from the tab list, excluded from the server list player count, and omitted from the hoverable player sample, all while receiving the familiar “left the game” broadcast to maintain immersion. Reappearing restores visibility everywhere with the standard “joined the game” message.

### Why it stands out
- Stealth moderation without disrupting gameplay or revealing staff presence to players.  
- Full server list integration: no tab entry, no hover name, and no contribution to the online count.  
- Vanilla-style join/leave messaging for seamless immersion with no custom spam.  
- Operator-only by default to prevent abuse and keep vanish tools in trusted hands.  
- Built for modern Paper 1.21.1 servers using the enhanced server-list API for accurate presentation.

### Features
- Invisible mode for operators:
  - Removed from tab list and excluded from server-list count and hover sample.  
  - Sends the classic yellow “left the game” when vanishing and “joined the game” when returning.  
- Live syncing:
  - New joiners won’t see vanished staff in tab; state remains consistent across joins.  
- Play normally while vanished:
  - Build, move, chat, test—everything functions as usual, just without public visibility.  
- Safe by design:
  - Operator-only commands enforced at both permission and code levels.  

### Commands
- /left  
  - Vanish the operator, broadcast the default “left the game,” remove from tab, and hide from server list count and hover.  
- /join  
  - Unvanish the operator, broadcast the default “joined the game,” and restore tab and server list visibility.  

### Permissions
  - Default: op  
  - Grants access to /left and /join.  

### Requirements
- Server: Paper 1.21.1 or compatible fork.  
- Java: A version compatible with the server runtime (e.g., Java 21 for 1.21.x).  

### Use cases
- Quietly investigate reports or suspicious behavior without tipping off players.  
- Test live features or events without inflating the public online count.  
- Prepare staff actions behind the scenes while keeping player immersion intact.  

Make moderation invisible, precise, and immersive with Ultimate Vanish.
